channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How this sex-forward gay cruising site finally launched an Apple-approved iOS app
item.description: As an app designed to facilitate gay hookups, popular site Sniffies has had a limitation since it started in 2018—it was only accessible via web browser. Until now. On Monday, the map-based cruising site debuted its Apple-approved iOS app.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Alibaba says its new AI model rivals DeepSeeks’s R-1, OpenAI’s o1
item.description: Alibaba Cloud on Thursday launched QwQ-32B, a compact reasoning model built on its latest large language model (LLM), Qwen2.5-32b, one it says delivers performance comparable to other large cutting edge models, including Chinese rival DeepSeek and OpenAI’s o1, with only 32 billion parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump signs executive order to establish government bitcoin reserve
item.description: President Donald Trump has signed an executive order establishing a government reserve of bitcoin, a key marker in the cryptocurrency’s journey towards possible mainstream acceptance.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tax scam alert: How to protect yourself and your tax refund
item.description: A cybersecurity firm has shed some light on just how common tax scams have become. Kurt the CyberGuy offers his advice for how to protect your refund.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Agentblazer: Salesforce announces agentic AI certification, learning path
item.description: Hot on the heels of the release of Agentforce 2dx for developing, testing, and deploying AI agents, Salesforce on Thursday introduced Agentblazer Status to its Trailhead online learning platform.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Trump's tariffs could pinch the tech sector
item.description: The tech industry is set to feel the pinch as the Trump administration levies new tariffs against key U.S. trading partners.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How to handle type erasure in advanced Java generics
item.description: Generics programming in Java enhances type safety and code reusability by allowing developers to define classes and methods using type parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Ecco come i leader IT si preparano alla grande sfida per la gestione degli agenti AI
item.description: Via via che gli AI agent arriveranno a occupare porzioni sempre più significative dei flussi di lavoro aziendali, i leader IT dovranno affrontare una sfida sempre più complessa: gestirli.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI pioneers win the Turing Award, tech’s top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Federal judge blocks drastic funding cuts to medical research
item.description: A federal judge is preventing the Trump administration from drastically cutting medical research funding.
item.dc:creator: Lauran Neergaard And Michael Casey, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Apple boosts Mac Studio, MacBook Air with super-powered processors
item.description: Apple’s spring season product launches continues. The company today followed the introduction of its new M4 iPad Air with two additional releases, a MacBook Air with an M4 chip and the latest super-powered upgrades to its most powerful Mac, the Mac Studio.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft's OpenAI Partnership Cleared by UK Watchdog
item.description: Britain's competition watchdog drops review of Microsoft-OpenAI deal, citing lack of control change
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Luxury glass trailer unfolds into a spacious home in just 15 minutes
item.description: Expandable's Touchdown is a designer trailer that promises a luxury off-grid living experience and unfolds into a home in about 15 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft Copilot tips: 9 ways to use Copilot right
item.description: Whether you believe AI will be the salvation of humankind or the death of it, whether you think it’s little more than a plaything to while away your time or the surest way to get onto the fast track at work, you’re going to use it someday. Maybe today. Maybe tomorrow. Maybe next week or next month.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Why you should use dependency injection
item.description: A few weeks ago, I wrote about how a good software team will defer decisions as long as possible. Smart teams will design and build systems that don’t lock them into any particular implementation until it is utterly necessary.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Soft robotic prosthetic hand uses nerve signals for more natural control
item.description: Researchers unveiled a new soft prosthetic hand that combines the natural coordination patterns of our fingers with the decoding of motoneuron activity in the spinal column.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to restore a deleted text message on iPhone
item.description: Accidentally deleting a text message on your iPhone or iPad is not a problem if you still need the message. Apple has a built-in way to recover it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: GAO’s Lindsey Saul on AI helping speed data analytics, improve oversight
item.description: AI presents opportunities for greater efficiency, but GAO chief data officer says its effectiveness hinges on data quality. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: GAO’s Lindsey Saul on AI helping speed data analytics, improve oversight first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network
